query: What Dominion Energy commercial customer service class pays the highest demand charge in Virginia?
final_answer:
**Dominion Energy Virginia’s “Schedule GS‑4 – Large General Service (Primary Voltage)”** pays the **highest demand charge** among the standard commercial/general service classes.

In the filed tariff for **Schedule GS‑4**, the **Distribution Demand** charge is shown as:

- **First 5,000 kW of Distribution Demand @ $2.717 per kW** (then **$2.076 per kW** for additional kW)  
  Source: Dominion Energy Virginia, *Schedule GS‑4 (Large General Service – Primary Voltage)* PDF (rate section showing “First 5,000 kW of Distribution Demand @ $2.717 per kW”).  
  https://www.dominionenergy.com/-/media/content/rates-and-tariffs/pdfs/virginia/large-business/schedule-gs4.pdf

So, the **service class** is **GS‑4 (Large General Service – Primary Voltage)**.

steps.content: Calling search_web
Calling run_python_code

tool_input.code:
import re, requests
from pdfminer.high_level import extract_text

def extract(url):
    data=requests.get(url,timeout=60).content
    open('/tmp/t.pdf','wb').write(data)
    text=extract_text('/tmp/t.pdf')
    return text

urls={
'GS2':'https://www.dominionenergy.com/-/media/content/rates-and-tariffs/pdfs/virginia/large-business/schedule-gs2.pdf',
'GS3':'https://www.dominionenergy.com/-/media/content/rates-and-tariffs/pdfs/virginia/large-business/schedule-gs3.pdf',
'GS4':'https://www.dominionenergy.com/-/media/content/rates-and-tariffs/pdfs/virginia/large-business/schedule-gs4.pdf',
'GS2T':'https://www.dominionenergy.com/-/media/content/rates-and-tariffs/pdfs/virginia/large-business/schedule-gs2t.pdf'
}

for k,u in urls.items():
    try:
        text=extract(u)
        # find lines with 'Demand' and '$' and 'per kW'
        lines=[ln.strip() for ln in text.splitlines() if '$' in ln and ('kW' in ln or 'kW.' in ln or 'per kW' in ln or 'per kW' in ln)]
        # filter to those mentioning Demand Charge
        sel=[ln for ln in lines if re.search(r'Demand',ln,re.I)]
        print('\n',k,'candidate lines',len(sel))
        for ln in sel[:25]:
            print(ln)
    except Exception as e:
        print(k,'error',e)

In the filed tariff for **Schedule GS‑4**, the **Distribution Demand** charge is shown as:

- **First 5,000 kW of Distribution Demand @ $2.717 per kW** (then **$2.076 per kW** for additional kW)  
  Source: Dominion Energy Virginia, *Schedule GS‑4 (Large General Service – Primary Voltage)* PDF (rate section showing “First 5,000 kW of Distribution Demand @ $2.717 per kW”).  
  https://www.dominionenergy.com/-/media/content/rates-and-tariffs/pdfs/virginia/large-business/schedule-gs4.pdf

So, the **service class** is **GS‑4 (Large General Service – Primary Voltage)**.
